trends.name: Bento Grid Layouts
trends.description: Asymmetric grid layouts inspired by Japanese bento boxes. Mix card sizes (1x1, 2x1, 1x2) for visual interest and information hierarchy.

trends.name: Glass Morphism
trends.description: Frosted glass effect with backdrop blur and semi-transparent backgrounds. Creates depth and layering.

trends.name: Gradient Mesh Backgrounds
trends.description: Multi-point gradient backgrounds using radial gradients and blend modes for organic, fluid color transitions.

trends.name: Scroll-Triggered Reveals
trends.description: Elements animate into view as user scrolls. Uses IntersectionObserver with staggered timing for child elements.

trends.name: Oversized Typography Heroes
trends.description: Hero sections dominated by extremely large display type (text-7xl to text-9xl) with minimal supporting elements.
trends.cssPattern: text-7xl md:text-8xl lg:text-9xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none

trends.name: Floating Card Effects
trends.description: Cards with elevated shadows and subtle hover animations that create a 3D floating effect.

trends.name: Subtle Grain/Noise Texture
trends.description: CSS-only noise overlay using SVG filter for organic, tactile feel. Adds warmth and reduces flat digital appearance.
trends.cssPattern: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml,...')] before:opacity-[0.03] before:pointer-events-none

trends.name: Split-Screen Layouts
trends.description: 50/50 or asymmetric split layouts with contrasting content on each side. Often text vs image or dark vs light.

trends.name: Animated Gradient Borders
trends.description: Cards and buttons with animated gradient borders using conic-gradient and CSS animation for eye-catching UI elements.

trends.name: Micro-Interaction Hover States
trends.description: Detailed hover animations on interactive elements: icon shifts, underline slides, arrow movements, color transitions.

trends.name: Dark Mode Sections
trends.description: Individual dark-background sections within an otherwise light page for contrast and emphasis. Often used for CTAs and testimonials.

trends.name: Sticky Transparent Header
trends.description: Header that starts transparent over hero content, then gains background/blur on scroll. Creates immersive hero experience.
trends.cssPattern: fixed top-0 inset-x-0 z-50 transition-all bg-transparent data-[scrolled=true]:bg-white/80 data-[scrolled=true]:backdrop-blur-lg data-[scrolled=true]:shadow-sm

trends.name: Asymmetric Grid Layouts
trends.description: Breaking away from symmetric grids with intentional misalignment, overlapping elements, and varied column widths.

trends.name: Variable Font Weight Transitions
trends.description: Animated font-weight changes on hover or scroll using variable fonts for fluid, eye-catching text effects.

trends.name: Multi-Layer Shadow Depth
trends.description: Multiple stacked box-shadows creating realistic depth perception. Replaces flat shadows with dimensional lighting effects.
